title: Normalized photometry artifact schema
$comment: Defines the required columns and formats for normalized photometric light-curve artifacts (Tidy/Long format).

mjd.description: Modified Julian Date of the observation.

filter.description: Identifier resolving to a filter manifest (e.g. 'csp-dr3-b').

magnitude_system.description: Override for the magnitude system if it differs from the filter default.

phase_observer.description: Observer-frame phase relative to a reference epoch (e.g. Tmax).

phase_rest.description: Rest-frame phase relative to a reference epoch, corrected for time dilation.

phase_err.description: Uncertainty in phase, incorporating uncertainty in the reference epoch.

quality_flag.description: Source-native quality indicator or selection bitmask.
